converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Mann Library records
Albert R. Mann Library
21-6-2748
43.2 cubic feet. 43.2 cubic feet.
1908-2011. Correspondence, Diaries, Financial Records, Printed Materials, Publications, Reports. Collection development records, vendor correspondence, and permanent records of the library of the New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences. Also old Mann Library plaque. Collection material in English 2315937
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Guy Smith
Date Completed:
February 2008
EAD encoding:
Philip Bahr, March 2008Daniel W. Young, February 2010
Date modified:
Marcie Farwell, July 2018
RELATED MATERIALS
Includes collection #13-7-538.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Correspondence, general
Series II. Correspondence, Sam Demas Day Files
Series III. Correspondence, Jan Olsen Appointment Books and Day Files
Series IV. Budget
Series V. Meeting Minutes, Reports, and Statistics
Series VI. Building Projects
Series VII. Miscellaneous
Series VIII. Manuals
Series IX. Awards
Cite As:
Mann Library records, #21-6-2748. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Scope and content
Correspondence, reports, meeting minutes, collection development records, building project records, and various other administrative records of the library of the New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences and the New York State College of Human Ecology. Also old Mann Library plaque.
Scope and content
Includes scrapbooks documenting the Ari van Tienhoven Award (1987-2011).
Academic librarians. Library finance. Library buildings. Academic libraries -- Statistics. Academic libraries -- Administration. Cornell University -- : Libraries.
